export const timeline = [{
  year: 1935,
  title: "Born in Portugal",
  description: "Born March 29 in Adoufe, Vila Real, Trás-os-Montes, Portugal.",
  category: "life",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1952,
  title: "Marriage to Rosa",
  description: "Married Rosa Ramos da Costa in Santiago de Alhariz, Vila Real, Trás-os-Montes, Portugal.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1953,
  title: "Father of Eight",
  description: "Between 1953 and 1971, António and Rosa raised eight children: Preciosa, Manuel, Dominic, Ernie, Prazeres, Clara, Luie, and Paul.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1956,
  title: "Portuguese Army",
  description: "Served with distinction in the Portuguese Army from 1956 to 1958.",
  category: "life",
  photo: "img_17.jpg",
  photoCaption: "António serving in the Portuguese Army, 1956–1958",
  photoPosition: "top center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1960,
  title: "Community Treasurer",
  description: "Served as Treasurer for the Grémio da Lavoura de Valpaços in Trás-os-Montes, Portugal from 1960 to 1966.",
  category: "community",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1966,
  title: "Emigrated to Canada",
  description: "Arrived alone in Chatham, Ontario, Canada — beginning a new chapter and building a life for his family.",
  category: "life",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1967,
  title: "Family Reunited",
  description: "Rosa and seven of their children joined António in Chatham, Ontario.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1971,
  title: "Founded Portuguese Canadian Social Club",
  description: "Co-founded the Portuguese Canadian Social Club of Chatham — a gathering place for the community to celebrate culture and build connections. He served as its first President.",
  category: "community",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1975,
  title: "Portuguese Supermarket",
  description: "Opened a Portuguese supermarket offering authentic foods and fish, serving the needs of the growing Portuguese Canadian community.",
  category: "business",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1977,
  title: "Forno's Travel Agency",
  description: "Founded and operated Forno's Travel Agency in Chatham, Leamington, and Windsor — primarily serving the Portuguese community for over 30 years.",
  category: "business",
  photo: "img_12.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Forno's Travel Agency",
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1977,
  title: "Appointed Notary Public",
  description: "Appointed as Notary Public by the Ontario government, serving the documentation needs of the Southwestern Ontario Portuguese community for over 40 years.",
  category: "community",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1979,
  title: "Nossa Senhora da Fátima Festa",
  description: "Helped establish the Nossa Senhora da Fátima Festa in Chatham, including arranging for the Our Lady of Fátima statue to be made in Portugal, blessed in Fátima, and imported to Canada. The festival continues to this day.",
  category: "community",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1979,
  title: "Conselho das Comunidades Portuguesas",
  description: "Began over 20 years of service as a member of the Conselho das Comunidades Portuguesas, eventually serving as President for Ontario and Manitoba.",
  category: "community",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1989,
  title: "Listed in Who's Who",
  description: "Listed in 'Who is Who in Portuguese Communities' — a recognition of his prominence as a community leader.",
  category: "honors",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1989,
  title: "Rosa Passed Away",
  description: "His beloved wife of 37 years, Rosa, passed away. She was a cornerstone of the family and deeply loved.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1993,
  title: "Married Maria Amaral",
  description: "Married Maria Amaral, welcoming her children Rick and Carmen into the family.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 1998,
  title: "Honorary Consul of Portugal",
  description: "Named Honorary Consul of Portugal — one of the highest recognitions awarded to a member of the Portuguese Canadian community.",
  category: "honors",
  photo: "DadConsul2.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Honorary Consul of Portugal, 1998",
  photoPosition: "top center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 2003,
  title: "Fourth Degree Knight",
  description: "Awarded a Fourth Degree Knighthood from the Knights of Columbus, the highest honour in that organization.",
  category: "honors",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 2009,
  title: "Retired from Travel Agency",
  description: "Retired from Forno's Travel Agency after over 30 years of service, though he continued his role as Notary Public.",
  category: "business",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 2023,
  title: "Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada",
  description: "Received a Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada in honour of the Coronation of His Majesty King Charles III, recognizing his extraordinary contribution and service to the community.",
  category: "honors",
  photo: "2025-CanadaAward.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada",
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "contain"
}, {
  year: 2023,
  title: "30 Years with Maria",
  description: "Celebrated 30 years of marriage with Maria Amaral — a testament to love, family, and resilience.",
  category: "family",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null,
  photoPosition: "center center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}, {
  year: 2025,
  title: "Passed Away",
  description: "António Joaquim Pereira Alves do Forno passed away on October 12, 2025, leaving behind a remarkable legacy of service, family, and community.",
  category: "life",
  photo: "img_01.jpg",
  photoCaption: "António Joaquim Pereira Alves do Forno",
  photoPosition: "top center",
  photoFit: "cover"
}];
